creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gnome->python

Something went horribly wrong with your python ports. I got here: 

$ ls -l /usr/local/bin/python* 
-r-xr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  1022960 17 øíj 11:21 /usr/local/bin/python* 
-r-xr-xr-x  2 root  wheel  1022960 17 øíj 11:21 /usr/local/bin/python2.4* 
-r-xr-xr-x  2 root  wheel     4696 17 øíj 11:21 /usr/local/bin/python-shared* 
-r-xr-xr-x  2 root  wheel     4696 17 øíj 11:21 /usr/local/bin/python-shared2.4*
